name: Bear Bull Traders
description_short: Day trading community and education platform by Andrew Aziz with live trading rooms, mentorship, and psychology coaching.
description_long:
Bear Bull Traders (BBT) is a day trading education community founded by Andrew Aziz, author of the bestselling book 'How to Day Trade for a Living.' The platform emphasizes a structured approach to learning day trading, with progressive education paths and strong community mentorship.

BBT offers multiple membership tiers from a $39 seven-day trial to Elite Monthly at $199/month. The community features live trading rooms where experienced traders call out setups in real-time, mentorship programs, and trading psychology resources that address the emotional challenges of trading.

What sets BBT apart is its emphasis on community and psychology alongside technical education. The mentorship model pairs newer traders with experienced community members, creating accountability and support that self-study courses cannot provide. The platform is more affordable than Warrior Trading while providing comparable education quality.
pros: Andrew Aziz's bestselling book as foundation
cons: No simulator or paper trading built in
Content quality depends on individual mentors
Elite plan at $199/mo adds up over time
company_background: Bear Bull Traders was founded to empower individuals to take control of their financial futures. The platform is an online community for traders serving members in over 100 countries.
scraped_features: 12+ professional trading courses with hundreds of lessons
Live trading chatroom with 26+ expert mentors during market hours
9 weekly live webinars plus recorded webinar library
Advanced charting tools and professional trading platforms
Trading psychology coaching and emotional management training
Daily market watchlists and real-time market analysis
In-person community trading summits and live events
unique_selling_points: Community of 28,000+ active traders across 100+ countries
Founded and led by Andrew Aziz, #1 best-selling author in Business & Finance category for 6 consecutive years
Trading psychology integrated as core educational pillar alongside technical training
Backed by peer-reviewed academic research studies validating strategy effectiveness
Live expert mentorship and real-time feedback in community chatroom during trading hours
meta_description: Day trading community and education platform by Andrew Aziz with live trading rooms, mentorship, and psychology coaching.
